title: Harvest, treat and store seed
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Harvest, treat and store seed demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for harvesting of seed

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work requirements with supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect seed according to harvesting plan, permits and approvals.

elements.title: Treat and store seed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate viable seed from chaff and waste material.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pack and store seeds to maintain viability.
